case_title: WING NG VS. KINWAI USA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KINWAI USA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,846.98 FILED BY NG, WING AS TO DEFENDANT KINWAI USA, INC. ANA ENTERPRISE INC. DBA ANA FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ANA ENTERPRISE INC. DBA ANA FURNITURE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2019 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, WING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KINWAI USA, INC. ANA ENTERPRISE INC. DBA ANA FURNITURE $2,846.98 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,926.98, KINWAI USA, INC. AND ANA ENTERPRISE, INC. ARE LIABLE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-12-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WING NG WITH WITNESS, CAROL NG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS KINWAI USA, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOEY WU AND ANA ENTERPRISE, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: CHONG JIAN ZHAO. DEFENDANT KINWAI USA, INC. WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II,, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
